# Baseline itinerary: 3 days in Barcelona for a family of four

## Goal and constraints understood
- **Travelers**: Family of four (2 adults, 2 children)
- **Dates**: 2026-08-10 to 2026-08-12
- **Budget**: €1,200 EUR
- **Avoid**: Late nights, long museum blocks
- **Must include**: Sagrada Familia, beach time, one kid-friendly food market

## Search summary
- Sagrada Familia: €36 (basilica + tower access), open 9am-8pm April-September. Source: [lasagradafamiliatickets.org](https://lasagradafamiliatickets.org/tickets/)
- Nova Icaria Beach: Family-friendly with calm waters, playgrounds, showers. Source: [Barcelona Turisme](https://www.barcelonaturisme.com/wv3/en/page/1537/nova-icaria-beach.html)
- La Boqueria Market: Kid-friendly food market, open daily except Sunday. Source: [Yelp/Mercat La Boqueria](https://www.yelp.com/biz/mercat-la-boqueria-barcelona)
- Park Güell: €21.90 per person, family-friendly with timed entry. Source: [museos.com](https://www.museos.com/en/barcelona/park-guell/)

## Day 1 – Monday, August 10

| Time | Type | Plan | Location | Cost | Evidence/Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---:|---|
| 09:00-11:00 | transport | Flight arrival and airport transfer to hotel | Barcelona El Prat → Eixample district | €15 (est.) | Taxi or Aerobus; verify live schedules |
| 11:00-12:00 | check-in | Hotel check-in and freshen up | Eixample area | — | Estimate; confirm with hotel |
| 12:30-14:30 | attraction | Visit Sagrada Familia | C/ de Mallorca, 401 | €144 (4×€36) | [Sagrada Familia Tickets](https://lasagradafamiliatickets.org/tickets/); book online in advance |
| 14:30-15:30 | lunch | Lunch near Sagrada Familia | Near C/ de Mallorca | €40 (est.) | Casual family restaurant |
| 15:30-18:00 | attraction | Explore exterior and gardens | Sagrada Familia grounds | — | Free; outdoor area |
| 18:30-20:00 | dinner | Early family dinner | Eixample area | €50 (est.) | Kid-friendly restaurant |
| 20:00-22:00 | rest | Return to hotel, rest | Hotel | — | No late nights per constraint |

## Day 2 – Tuesday, August 11

| Time | Type | Plan | Location | Cost | Evidence/Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---:|---|
| 08:30-09:30 | transport | Metro to Barceloneta beach | Eixample → Barceloneta | €10 (est.) | Metro L4; verify fares |
| 09:30-12:30 | beach | Beach time at Nova Icaria | Nova Icaria Beach | €15 (est.) | Umbrellas/loungers; [Barcelona Turisme](https://www.barcelonaturisme.com/wv3/en/page/1537/nova-icaria-beach.html) |
| 12:30-14:00 | lunch | Lunch at La Boqueria Market | La Rambla, 91 | €45 (est.) | [Kid-friendly market](https://stumbleabroad.net/2013/06/19/barcelonaforkids-la-boqueria/); fresh produce & tapas |
| 14:00-16:00 | beach | Return to beach / free time | Nova Icaria | €10 (est.) | More beach time per constraint |
| 16:30-18:30 | attraction | Walk along Barceloneta promenade | Port Olímpic area | — | Scenic walk, family-friendly |
| 19:00-20:30 | dinner | Early dinner near beach | Port Olímpic | €45 (est.) | Restaurants with kids' menus |
| 20:30-22:00 | transport | Return to hotel | Metro to Eixample | €10 (est.) | Metro L4 |

## Day 3 – Wednesday, August 12

| Time | Type | Plan | Location | Cost | Evidence/Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---:|---|
| 08:30-09:30 | transport | Metro/bus to Park Güell | Eixample → Park Güell (Carrer d'Olot) | €10 (est.) | Bus 24 or 92; verify routes |
| 09:30-12:30 | attraction | Visit Park Güell | Carrer d'Olot, 1 | €87.60 (4×€21.90) | [Park Güell Tickets](https://www.museos.com/en/barcelona/park-guell/); book time-slot in advance |
| 12:30-14:00 | lunch | Lunch in Gràcia neighborhood | Carrer de la Providència area | €40 (est.) | Local tapas bar |
| 14:00-16:00 | free/shop | Free time / souvenir shopping | Gràcia or Eixample | €30 (est.) | Flexible time |
| 16:00-18:00 | rest | Return to hotel, pack | Hotel | — | Prepare for departure |
| 18:00-20:00 | transport | Transfer to airport | Eixample → El Prat | €15 (est.) | Taxi or Aerobus |
| 20:00-22:00 | transport | Flight departure | Barcelona El Prat | — | Verify flight times |

## Budget summary

| Category | Estimated Cost (EUR) |
|---|---:|
| Sagrada Familia (4) | €144 |
| Park Güell (4) | €87.60 |
| Beach (umbrellas/loungers) | €25 |
| Meals (9 meals × ~€45) | €405 |
| Transport (metro/taxi) | €75 |
| Contingency/souvenirs | €80 |
| **Total estimated** | **€816.60** |

**Remaining budget**: ~€383 (within €1,200 limit)

## Unscheduled or uncertain items
- Exact hotel booking and location not specified (assumed Eixample for central access)
- Flight numbers and airline not available (Tavily search limitation)
- Specific restaurant reservations not made
- Exact metro fares to be verified at station

## Assumptions and gaps
- Hotel prices require live booking confirmation; budget assumes mid-range family hotel
- August is peak season—advance booking strongly recommended for Sagrada Familia and Park Güell
- Children's ticket prices assumed same as adult; verify if child discounts apply
- Weather assumed suitable for beach (August typical); have backup indoor plan if needed
- No theme park or aquarium included per "avoid long museum blocks" constraint
